title: Professional Contractors - Elite South Texas
content:
Our products are sold through regional technical offices throughout the world and only to experienced contractors. These products are not available in supply stores. Our offices assist independent contractors with technical support as well as finding and specifying projects with specialty surfaces or flooring requirements. These regional technical offices offer lunch-and-learns for contractors in the familiarization of our products and systems.
Working with property owners, architects, general contractors and specifiers on the proper recommendations and specifications is a key part of our strategy as well. Once projects are acquired, only experienced contractors are invited to provide an estimate.
